Data.Name: PhantomRoot Relay
Data.Description: A rented neural relay with three stolen visual feeds queued: gala, security, and service-floor courier cam.

Data.Name: Gala Visual Feed
Data.Description: A remote feed handoff into Vale Nyx's camera contacts on the gala floor.

Data.Name: Security Visual Feed
Data.Description: A hardline camera feed into the building's security spine.

Data.Name: Return Feed
Data.Description: Collapse the gala feed and snap back to the safehouse relay.

Data.Name: Return Feed
Data.Description: Collapse the security feed and snap back to the safehouse relay.

Data.Name: Executive Lift
Data.Description: Silas Wren's private lift, currently locked to gala authority and bodyguard biometrics.

Data.Name: Telemetry Server Rack
Data.Description: The rack carrying optic telemetry, heart-rate mirrors, and enough audit logging to make murder bureaucratic.

Data.Name: Hijacked Camera
Data.Description: A ceiling camera with a clean sightline and a dirty credential token.

Data.Name: North Camera
Data.Description: A compromised camera watching the security spine.

Data.Name: Ilya's Safehouse Bag
Data.Description: A black responder-sized duffel packed for remote work: decks, spoof keys, and medical countermeasures for nervous systems under load.

Data.Name: PhantomRoot Neural Deck
Data.Description: A black-market neural deck tuned to slip into another person's optic stream and treat vision like a shared filesystem.

Data.Name: Neural Crown Harness
Data.Description: A cranial harness that keeps Ilya conscious while PhantomRoot borrows someone else's eyes.

Data.Name: Visual Feed Tap
Data.Description: A clipped optic bridge that maps hostile camera feeds into PhantomRoot's control lattice.

Data.Name: Blackout Patch
Data.Description: A transdermal patch that damps panic tremors during long visual-feed jumps.

Data.Name: Spoofed Biometric Key
Data.Description: A false biometric packet shaped like a VIP handprint and a very convincing lie.

Data.Name: Logic Bomb Module
Data.Description: A one-shot payload built to blind gala security for the eight seconds that matter.

Data.Name: Trace Battery Cell
Data.Description: A hot-swappable cell for the neural relay. It buys time while making the trace louder.

Data.Name: Vale's Suppressed Smart Pistol
Data.Description: A service-profile pistol with quiet cycling, polite recoil, and impolite telemetry.

Data.Name: 1x1 Smart Magazine
Data.Description: A compact 1x1 magazine of guided subsonic rounds paired to Vale's pistol.

Data.Name: Vale's Service Tray Kit
Data.Description: A covert kit disguised as a service tray: contacts, badges, and the pistol that ends the argument.

Data.Name: Camera Contact Lenses
Data.Description: Contact lenses that stream Vale's visual feed to PhantomRoot through a laundering relay.

Data.Name: Silas Wren's Gala Badge
Data.Description: A high-clearance badge tied to the target's lift privileges and biometrics.

Data.Name: Encrypted Kill Contract
Data.Description: The job terms, payout escrow, proof-of-death packet, and no refund clause.

Data.Name: Palm Surveillance Microdrone
Data.Description: A pocket drone for borrowing angles when human eyes are pointed the wrong way.

Data.Name: Telemetry Server Blade
Data.Description: A removable server blade holding the target's optic telemetry and gala route predictions.

Data.Name: Kade Ceramic Armor Wafer
Data.Description: Executive security armor: thin, expensive, and difficult to explain through.

Data.Name: Silas's Black Gala Jacket
Data.Description: A tailored gala jacket with ceramic collar, gold pins, and a throat implant under the line.

Data.Name: Silent Injector Pen
Data.Description: A compact injector meant to look medical until the chemistry hits.

Data.Name: Dead Man's Switch Puck
Data.Description: A palm-sized switch keyed to the contract escrow. It records whether the hit stayed quiet.

Data.Name: Ilya Voss
Data.Description: A remote-hit specialist running PhantomRoot from a rented safehouse. Ilya does not need line of sight; they need someone else's eyes, a valid feed, and a clean exit clause.

Data.Name: Vale Nyx
Data.Description: A courier-infiltrator inside the gala. Her contacts stream clean vision to Ilya; her tray hides the physical tools the remote job still needs.

Data.Name: Silas Wren
Data.Description: A luxury biotech executive attending his own victory party. The contract wants him dead quietly, before he sells a neural-rights witness list to a rival board.

Data.Name: Juno Kade
Data.Description: Silas Wren's security chief. She watches exits, body language, and feed anomalies with the kind of patience that ruins remote jobs.

Data.Name: Ilya's Operator Hood
Data.Description: A matte black hood threaded with shielded cable runs for long PhantomRoot sessions.
Data.FlavorText: It hides the sweat before the job hides the body.

Data.Name: Ghostline Feed Visor
Data.Description: A low-profile visor that keeps tapped feeds pinned at the edge of Ilya's vision.
Data.FlavorText: Three borrowed eyes, one rented room.

Data.Name: Signal-Damped Compression Shirt
Data.Description: A black underlayer that bleeds heat away from the PhantomRoot neural deck.
Data.FlavorText: Comfort for the body, plausible denial for the trace.

Data.Name: Cable-Runner Jacket
Data.Description: A cropped technical jacket with hidden patch bays under the lapels.
Data.FlavorText: Every pocket has a different alibi.

Data.Name: Haptic Switch Gloves
Data.Description: Thin operator gloves with pressure sensors mapped to PhantomRoot feed controls.
Data.FlavorText: A kill command should never need a loud keypress.

Data.Name: Blackout Cargo Pants
Data.Description: Flexible black cargo pants with sealed battery loops and a panic-drop pocket.
Data.FlavorText: Built for kneeling behind cheap furniture.

Data.Name: Softstep Operator Boots
Data.Description: Quiet ankle boots with conductive soles for grounding deck surge.
Data.FlavorText: No squeaks. No witnesses.

Data.Name: Vale's Service Shirt
Data.Description: A crisp white service shirt cut to hide a panic patch and a holdout mic.
Data.FlavorText: Undercover means laundering your breathing too.

Data.Name: Vale's Service Blazer
Data.Description: A black catering blazer with a gold venue pin and a pocket slit for the smart pistol.
Data.FlavorText: Waitstaff uniform, broker posture.

Data.Name: Grip-Tack Tray Gloves
Data.Description: Service gloves with transparent grip film and a hidden trigger callus.
Data.FlavorText: Never spill the drink. Only the target.

Data.Name: Vale's Service Slacks
Data.Description: Black service slacks tailored for quick exits through staff corridors.
Data.FlavorText: Looks rented. Moves custom.

Data.Name: Silent Service Loafers
Data.Description: Polished black shoes with damped soles and a ceramic toe wedge.
Data.FlavorText: Perfect for crossing marble without joining the conversation.

Data.Name: Blink Cosmetic Lens
Data.Description: A cosmetic ocular surround that makes Silas's experimental prediction optic look like fashion.
Data.FlavorText: Future sight, dressed as vanity.

Data.Name: Silas's Gala Shirt
Data.Description: A severe black formal shirt with gold collar hardware and biometric thread.
Data.FlavorText: The collar costs more than most people's exits.

Data.Name: Predictive Gold Cufflinks
Data.Description: Gold cufflinks paired to Silas's calendar, threat model, and ego.
Data.FlavorText: They know when he is about to gesture.

Data.Name: Silas's Gala Trousers
Data.Description: Tailored black gala trousers with smart-crease motors and gold side piping.
Data.FlavorText: Never wrinkled. Never sorry.

Data.Name: Silas's Formal Shoes
Data.Description: Gloss black formal shoes with a biometric lift-bank handshake in the heel.
Data.FlavorText: Access control, but smug.

Data.Name: Kade Threat Lens
Data.Description: A redline tactical lens clipped over one eye for target sorting and badge checks.
Data.FlavorText: Security sees patterns. Juno sees problems.

Data.Name: Kade Tactical Underlayer
Data.Description: A black compression underlayer with impact-mesh ribs and red service tabs.
Data.FlavorText: The part of the uniform that never gets photographed.

Data.Name: Kade Security Vest
Data.Description: A compact armored security vest with a white plate face and red alert seams.
Data.FlavorText: Corporate peace, ceramic version.

Data.Name: Kade Duty Gloves
Data.Description: Black duty gloves with reinforced knuckles and red status lights.
Data.FlavorText: Polite hands for impolite work.

Data.Name: Kade Duty Pants
Data.Description: Armored black duty pants with knee plates and a baton clip.
Data.FlavorText: Made to run toward alarms.

Data.Name: Kade Security Boots
Data.Description: Heavy black boots with white toe armor and red sole lights.
Data.FlavorText: They announce authority one tile at a time.

Data.Name: Ghostline Ocular Router
Data.Description: A cybernetic ocular router that lets Ilya keep hostile feeds open without losing her own sight.
Data.FlavorText: One eye on the room, three eyes elsewhere.

Data.Name: PhantomRoot Cortical Relay
Data.Description: A cortical relay tuned for feed possession, prediction lag, and pain suppression.
Data.FlavorText: The deck whispers. The relay answers.

Data.Name: Trace-Sink Nerve Bus
Data.Description: A disposable internal bus that soaks trace spikes before they reach Ilya's motor cortex.
Data.FlavorText: A fuse with a pulse.

Data.Name: Vale Ocular Feed Bridge
Data.Description: A tiny feed bridge behind Vale's camera contacts, laundering her sightline to PhantomRoot.
Data.FlavorText: The waiter blinks. Ilya sees.

Data.Name: Blink Prediction Optic
Data.Description: The experimental corporate optic that projects likely futures into Silas's visual field.
Data.FlavorText: It sees the next second. It did not see the invoice.

Data.Name: Premium Biomonitor Mesh
Data.Description: A premium internal biomonitor that reports stress, toxins, and subscriber-grade fear.
Data.FlavorText: Every heartbeat has a service tier.

Data.Name: Kade Threat Lens Implant
Data.Description: A security-grade tactical lens that flags weapons, faces, and unpaid risk.
Data.FlavorText: Threats render brighter when someone else owns the building.

Data.Name: Subdermal Ceramic Mesh
Data.Description: A corporate security implant that stiffens under sudden impact.
Data.FlavorText: Armor you can clock in with.

Data.Name: Kade Security Sidearm
Data.Description: A suppressed executive-security pistol keyed to Juno Kade's grip print.

Data.Name: Vale's Spoof Lapel Pin
Data.Description: A lapel pin shell hiding the shimmer of a biometric spoof key without spending the key itself as clothing.
Data.FlavorText: Service smile, forged pulse.

Data.Name: Silas' VIP Badge Lanyard
Data.Description: A Joy Works gala credential on a smart-fabric lanyard, tuned to keep Silas visible to security and invisible to scrutiny.
Data.FlavorText: Access looks cleaner when it has a logo.

Data.Name: Juno's Deadman Collar Clip
Data.Description: A visible collar clip wired to Juno's contract telemetry, worn as both threat display and status marker.
Data.FlavorText: A warning light that chose a uniform.
